summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology. I have built and deployed ML systems across computer vision, NLP, and LLM applications — including a YOLO pipeline on Kubernetes that improved accuracy by 30% and a RAG developer tool that is live in production. I am comfortable owning a model from data prep through deployment and care about building systems that scale reliably.

skills.languages: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, Go, Java (familiar), C++ (familiar)
skills.ml: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, HuggingFace Transformers, LangChain, RAG, LLMs, Computer Vision, NLP, Prompt Engineering
skills.infra: Docker, Kubernetes, GCP, AWS, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), FastAPI, Pinecone, FAISS, MySQL, Git
